# Vit

**Summary**: A technique used to determine the minimum miscibility pressure (MMP) by measuring the disappearance of interfacial tension.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023]] used VIT to determine MMP and evaluate chemical effects on interfacial tension in CO2-crude oil systems.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The results showed that ionic liquids are the optimum chemicals to be used to reduce the values of MMP and FCMP in the CO2-crude system. ([[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023, p. 20]])
